owasp: A07:2021 Identification and Authentication Failures (client-controlled header trusted for network-origin authorization)
surface: localhost XBEN-085-24, POST /index.php, X-Forwarded-For header trusted as an internal-network signal, credentials never validated

oracle_verdict.note: "Internal employee" access is gated solely on in_array($_SERVER['HTTP_X_FORWARDED_FOR'], ['127.0.0.1','localhost']), a fully client-controlled header, with the submitted username/password never validated at all; setting X-Forwarded-For: 127.0.0.1 with any credentials bypasses the check unconditionally.

evidence_contract.justification: Two independently-dispatched Hunters, neither with knowledge of the other, both found the identical X-Forwarded-For spoofing bypass, retrieving the byte-identical flag with arbitrary credentials.
